patterns: something is wrong with my health
responses: I can help with general symptom guidance. Tell me the main symptom, when it started, and whether it is getting worse.
Please describe the symptom, how long you have had it, and whether you have fever, pain, breathing trouble, or medicine allergies.
Share your symptoms in one message, and I will try to guide you with general next steps. For severe symptoms, seek urgent medical care.

patterns: what should i do for fever
responses: For mild fever, rest, drink fluids, and monitor your temperature. If the fever is very high, lasts more than a couple of days, or comes with breathing trouble or confusion, contact a doctor quickly.
Fever often improves with rest, hydration, and appropriate fever medicine if it is safe for you. If you are unsure which medicine is suitable, ask with the medicine name.
Please watch for warning signs like dehydration, chest pain, persistent vomiting, or worsening weakness. Those need medical attention.
For cough or cold, rest, fluids, warm liquids, and avoiding smoke can help. If you have chest pain, shortness of breath, or symptoms that keep worsening, see a doctor.
A cough or cold can improve with hydration and symptom relief medicines. If you want medicine guidance, tell me the exact medicine name or your main symptom.
If the cough lasts a long time, becomes severe, or includes breathing trouble or high fever, please seek medical care.
Headaches can happen for many reasons such as stress, dehydration, poor sleep, or illness. Rest, fluids, and avoiding bright screens may help mild headaches.
If your headache is sudden and severe, comes with weakness, confusion, fainting, or vision changes, seek urgent medical care.
If you want medicine guidance for headache relief, share the medicine name so I can give general safety information.
Common allergy symptoms include sneezing, itching, rash, or watery eyes. If swelling, breathing trouble, or faintness happens, treat it as an emergency.
Please tell me whether the allergy seems related to food, dust, pollen, or a medicine. That helps narrow down the safest next step.
If a new medicine caused rash, swelling, or breathing issues, stop and contact a doctor or pharmacist immediately.
I can give general information about a medicine's common use, usual precautions, and when to ask a doctor. Send the exact medicine name.
Share the medicine name, and I can explain what it is commonly used for and the kind of precautions people should review.
If you have the medicine name and strength, send them together for clearer guidance.

patterns: when should i take this tablet
responses: I can give general medicine timing guidance, but I cannot confirm an exact safe dose without the medicine name, strength, age, and prescription instructions.
If you missed a dose, the correct next step depends on the medicine. Share the medicine name before taking extra medicine.
Please check your prescription label first. If you want help understanding it, send the medicine name and the instruction written on the pack.

patterns: is this medicine causing side effects
what reactions can this medicine cause
responses: Many medicines can cause side effects like nausea, dizziness, sleepiness, or stomach upset, but the exact list depends on the medicine. Share the medicine name.
If a medicine causes severe rash, swelling, trouble breathing, chest pain, or fainting, get urgent medical care.
Tell me the medicine name and what symptom started after taking it, and I can give general guidance.

patterns: how do i view my prescription
responses: You can review your prescriptions from the Prescription section in your account. If you want help understanding a medicine listed there, send the medicine name.
Your prescription page is the best place to check the doctor instructions and medicine list. I can explain common medicine guidance after you share the name.
If you are unsure what a prescription instruction means, copy the wording here and I will explain it in simpler terms.

patterns: how do i book a doctor
responses: You can book or review visits from the Appointments section in your dashboard. If you tell me your symptom, I can suggest what kind of doctor may be relevant.
Use the appointment pages in your account to schedule or review doctor visits. I can also help you prepare questions for the doctor.
If you need help deciding whether to book an appointment, tell me the symptom and how long it has been happening.
You can review your medicine orders from the order, payment, and invoice pages in your account. If an order is still unpaid, complete the payment step first.
Order progress is usually easiest to verify from your order list and invoice pages. If you tell me what step you are stuck on, I can guide you.
For cart, payment, or invoice questions, tell me whether the issue is before payment or after payment so I can narrow it down.
Healthy habits usually start with enough water, regular meals, good sleep, daily movement, and taking medicines only as advised.
A balanced routine with exercise, hydration, vegetables, protein, and steady sleep can improve overall health. I can give tips for one area if you want.
Tell me whether you want help with diet, sleep, exercise, or stress, and I will keep the advice focused.
I am sorry you are dealing with that. Slow breathing, water, short breaks, and talking to someone you trust can help in the moment.
If stress or anxiety is affecting daily life, consider speaking with a doctor or mental health professional for more personal support.
If you feel unsafe or think you might harm yourself, seek emergency help immediately and contact a trusted person right away.
This may be an emergency. Call emergency services or go to the nearest hospital immediately.
For chest pain, breathing trouble, severe bleeding, seizures, or loss of consciousness, please seek emergency medical care right away.
Do not rely on chat alone for severe or rapidly worsening symptoms. Get urgent help now.
I could not fully understand that. Try asking about symptoms, medicines, side effects, prescriptions, appointments, or order help.
I am not sure I understood. You can ask me about common symptoms, medicine guidance, prescriptions, appointments, or medicine orders.
